w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Figure 6 illustrates the actual User/Tourist interactions in your app. The user logs in with Google via Firebase Authentication, passes through the welcome slides, and arrives at the home dashboard. From there the user can access learning content, take quizzes, and use the AI chat assistant. The “Login” and “Welcome” functions provide secure access and route the user to the correct app sections. The “Chat with AI” feature supports intelligent assistance, including translation, voice input, and image attachment processing. The “Learn” and “Quiz” functions deliver language learning content and progress tracking. The “Profile” and “Notification” features let the user manage personal settings, language preferences, and app alerts.
Figure 7 shows the admin interactions found in the

-admin portal. The admin signs in, opens the dashboard, and navigates between Users, Chats, Dialects, AI Training, Settings, and Activity Log. The “Users” function allows viewing and managing learner profiles. The “Chats” function allows reviewing synced chat sessions from the learner app. The “Dialects” function allows managing language region data, while the “AI Training” function supports reviewing and correcting model phrases. The “Settings” and “Activity Log” functions support configuration and audit of admin actions.
Figure 8 illustrates the sequence of interactions when a user sends a message in the chat. The user enters text or voice input, the frontend application captures and formats the request, sends it to

API via the backend, which calls DeepSeek AI model, receives the translation or response, and returns it to the user interface for display. This sequence shows the timing and order of operations to ensure smooth user experience.
Figure 9 illustrates the structured design of the

language-learning application composed of interconnected entities that support user interaction, language content management, and chat monitoring. The core of the system revolves around the users table,
which stores user information and connects to multiple modules such as

, notifications, and dialect preferences. Each user can have multiple chat sessions, receive notifications, and maintain learning progress and streak history, establishing one-to-many relationships across these entities.

The dialects table serves as another central component, containing detailed information about Philippine languages and regional variations. Each dialect can be associated with multiple users who select it as their preferred learning language. The dialects table includes language codes, native names, speaker counts, regions, and cultural metadata to support comprehensive language learning.

table captures user conversations with the AI assistant, including message history, timestamps, and the dialect being used. Each chat session belongs to a single user and records interaction history for user reference and potential AI training. The notifications table ensures communication by delivering updates and alerts related to learning reminders, streak alerts, level-up messages, and community notifications.
On the administrative side, additional tables such as
are used to manage system operations. The
table stores administrator account information linked to users through a foreign key relationship. The
table maintains an audit trail of admin actions including user management, dialect updates, and settings changes. The
table stores phrases from user interactions where the AI model performed

, along with corrections and training status, supporting continuous improvement of the language model. These entities together ensure efficient system management and comprehensive tracking of all system operations.

The data dictionary covers the fields, lengths, types, and descriptions of data used in the system. It facilitates the development of the system database and supports readers in comprehending the connections among the information in the database.
Unique user identifier from Firebase Auth
User's profile image URL or base64

Table 4 structure allows for comprehensive user information management while maintaining flexibility for storing authentication, profile, and learning progress data. It supports Firebase Authentication integration and enables tracking of user engagement through streaks and activity dates while accommodating language preference personalization.
Native name in the dialect language

Table 5 structure allows for comprehensive management of Philippine dialect information while maintaining flexibility for cultural and linguistic content. It stores language codes, native names, regional data, and speaker information to support personalized language learning experiences and cultural context.
Reference to the user who initiated the chat
Dialect used in this chat session
Array of message objects with role, content, and timestamps

Table 6 structure allows for efficient management of user-AI chat interactions while maintaining flexibility in capturing conversation history, message types, and language preferences. It stores detailed chat content, enabling users to review past conversations and supporting AI model improvements through training data collection.
Reference to the user receiving the notification

Table 7 structure allows for efficient management of system-generated alerts and updates while maintaining flexibility for different notification types and preferences. It tracks notification delivery, read status, and timestamps to ensure users are informed about learning reminders, achievements, and system updates.

Table 8 structure allows for structured management of administrative accounts while maintaining security and role-based access control. It links admin functions to user accounts and tracks administrative status for proper system governance.
Reference to the admin who performed the action
Target of the action (user, dialect, etc.)
Table 9 structure maintains a comprehensive audit trail of administrative activities for security and accountability. It records all significant admin actions including user
management, content updates, and settings changes to support system monitoring and compliance tracking.
The original phrase from user input

Table 10 structure enables effective monitoring and improvement of AI model performance while maintaining flexibility for capturing misrecognitions and corrections. It stores phrases where the model performed
along with corrections and training notes to support continuous enhancement of translation and language assistance capabilities.
